welcome.title: Hi, what's your plan for today?
welcome.placeholder: Send a message, upload files, open a folder, or create a scheduled task...
welcome.modelSwitchNotSupported: Model list will be available after first connection. Send a message to connect and load available models.
welcome.quickActionStar: Like us? Give us a star!
welcome.skillsMarketDesc: Search and activate community Skills on demand. Configure once, available for all agents.

history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
history.exportDialogSingleDescription: Export current topic conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and project files into a ZIP package.
history.exportDialogBatchDescription: Export {{count}} selected topics' conversation records (JSON + Markdown) and project files into one ZIP package.
history.exportDialogHint: Folder selection follows the same interaction as changing the project.
history.removeProjectConfirm: Remove project "{{name}}"? Its {{count}} conversation(s) will be removed too.
history.importDesktopOnly: Import is only available in the desktop app

historySearch.title: Search conversation content
historySearch.description: Search historical messages by keyword, load more on scroll, and jump to the matched message.

noModelConfigured: No model configured. Please configure in settings.

pathVariants.WORKSPACE_PATH_UNAVAILABLE: The selected workspace path is unavailable. Make sure the workspace path "{{workspacePath}}" exists and is accessible.

codes.TEAM_ASSISTANT_ID_REQUIRED: Please select an assistant before creating the team.
codes.TEAM_ASSISTANT_NOT_FOUND: Assistant {{assistantId}} is no longer available. Refresh the assistant list and choose another one.

resolution.retry: Retry later, or send this message again.
resolution.wait_for_current_response: Wait for the current response to finish before sending another message.
resolution.start_new_session: Start a new conversation before continuing.
resolution.reconnect_agent: Restart or reconnect the selected agent, then retry.
resolution.check_agent_login: Log in to the selected agent, or refresh its credentials.
resolution.check_agent_installation: Check the agent installation and local command configuration.
resolution.check_agent_version: Check the agent protocol and version compatibility.
resolution.check_local_command: Install the missing command, or confirm it has been added to PATH.
resolution.check_provider_credentials: Check the model provider API key or account credentials in settings.
resolution.check_provider_billing: Check the model provider balance, credits, or quota.
resolution.check_provider_base_url: Check the model provider Base URL, API path, proxy, and API compatibility.
resolution.change_model: Choose a model that is available for the current account and supports this request.
resolution.reduce_context: Reduce the message content, referenced files, or context size, then retry.
resolution.send_feedback: Send feedback with logs so the team can investigate.

LINGAI_STREAM_BROKEN.title: Response stream was interrupted
LINGAI_STREAM_BROKEN.body: The app accepted your message but the response stream ended unexpectedly. Please retry; if it happens again, send feedback.

LINGAI_STATE_INCONSISTENT.title: Conversation state is out of sync
LINGAI_STATE_INCONSISTENT.body: The conversation state is out of sync. Restart this chat or reload the app before retrying.

LINGAI_PERMISSION_ERROR.title: Could not access the requested resource
LINGAI_PERMISSION_ERROR.body: A local permission or filesystem check failed. Check the project path and app permissions, then retry.

LINGAI_INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Request failed in the app
LINGAI_INTERNAL_ERROR.body: The request failed while the app was processing it. Please retry once; if it repeats, send feedback.

LINGAI_CONVERSATION_BUSY.title: Conversation is busy
LINGAI_CONVERSATION_BUSY.body: Another response is still running. Wait for it to finish before sending a new message.

USER_AGENT_NOT_INSTALLED.title: The selected agent is not installed
USER_AGENT_NOT_INSTALLED.body: Install the CLI or app required by this agent, then reconnect it in settings.

USER_AGENT_STARTUP_FAILED.title: The selected agent failed to start
USER_AGENT_STARTUP_FAILED.body: The agent process exited before it was ready. Check its installation, login status, and local command configuration.

USER_AGENT_OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_UNREACHABLE.title: OpenClaw Gateway is not reachable
USER_AGENT_OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_UNREACHABLE.body:
OpenClaw Gateway is not running or cannot be reached at 127.0.0.1:18789.

Start OpenClaw Gateway and try again. You can run:
openclaw gateway status
openclaw gateway start

USER_AGENT_DISCONNECTED.title: The selected agent disconnected
USER_AGENT_DISCONNECTED.body: The agent connection closed while handling this message. Restart or reconnect the agent, then retry.

USER_AGENT_AUTH_REQUIRED.title: The selected agent needs authentication
USER_AGENT_AUTH_REQUIRED.body: Log in to the selected agent or refresh its credentials, then send the message again.

USER_AGENT_SESSION_NOT_FOUND.title: The agent session was lost
USER_AGENT_SESSION_NOT_FOUND.body: The agent reported that this session was not found or is no longer known to it.

USER_AGENT_UNSUPPORTED_METHOD.title: The selected agent does not support this action
USER_AGENT_UNSUPPORTED_METHOD.body: The agent reported that the requested ACP method is not supported or is not available.

USER_AGENT_INVALID_PARAMS.title: The selected agent rejected the request
USER_AGENT_INVALID_PARAMS.body: The agent reported that the request parameters were invalid.

USER_AGENT_HANDSHAKE_FAILED.title: Agent handshake failed
USER_AGENT_HANDSHAKE_FAILED.body: The selected agent could not complete its startup handshake. Restart or reconnect the agent, then retry.

USER_AGENT_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT.title: Agent handshake timed out
USER_AGENT_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT.body: The selected agent did not finish its startup handshake in time. Check whether it is still starting or blocked, then retry.

USER_AGENT_ACP_INIT_FAILED.title: Agent protocol initialization failed
USER_AGENT_ACP_INIT_FAILED.body: The app could not initialize an Agent Client Protocol session with this agent.

USER_AGENT_PROTOCOL_PARSE_ERROR.title: Agent reported a protocol parse error
USER_AGENT_PROTOCOL_PARSE_ERROR.body: The selected agent reported that an ACP/JSON-RPC message could not be parsed.

USER_AGENT_INVALID_REQUEST.title: Agent reported an invalid protocol request
USER_AGENT_INVALID_REQUEST.body: The selected agent reported that the ACP/JSON-RPC request object was invalid.

USER_AGENT_RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.title: Agent could not find a required resource
USER_AGENT_RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.body: The selected agent reported that a required resource, such as a file, was not found.

USER_AGENT_PROTOCOL_ERROR.title: Agent returned a protocol error
USER_AGENT_PROTOCOL_ERROR.body: The selected agent returned a non-standard ACP error code.

USER_AGENT_PROTOCOL_MISMATCH.title: Agent protocol versions are incompatible
USER_AGENT_PROTOCOL_MISMATCH.body: The app and selected agent could not use a compatible ACP protocol version.

USER_AGENT_NO_PREVIOUS_SESSION.title: Previous agent session is unavailable
USER_AGENT_NO_PREVIOUS_SESSION.body: The agent cannot resume the previous session. Start a new conversation to continue.

USER_AGENT_COMMAND_NOT_FOUND.title: Agent command was not found
USER_AGENT_COMMAND_NOT_FOUND.body: The configured agent command could not be found. Install it or update the command path in settings.

USER_AGENT_MISSING_ENV.title: Agent environment is missing required variables
USER_AGENT_MISSING_ENV.body: The agent needs environment variables that are not configured. Add them in settings or your shell environment, then reconnect.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_AUTH_FAILED.title: Model provider authentication failed
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_AUTH_FAILED.body: The selected provider rejected the API key or account credentials. Check the provider settings and try again.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_AWS_SSO_EXPIRED.title: AWS SSO session expired
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_AWS_SSO_EXPIRED.body: Your AWS SSO session has expired. Run 'aws sso login' for the matching profile, then send the message again.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_CONFIG_ERROR.title: Model provider configuration is invalid
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_CONFIG_ERROR.body: The provider request could not be built from the current settings. Check credentials, region, Base URL, and provider-specific configuration before retrying.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_MODEL_NOT_FOUND.title: The selected model was not found
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_MODEL_NOT_FOUND.body: The provider does not recognize this model name. Choose an available model from settings and retry.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED.title: Model provider rate limit reached
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED.body: The provider is temporarily limiting requests. Wait a moment, reduce request frequency, or switch models.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT.title: Model provider request timed out
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT.body: The provider did not respond in time. Retry later or switch to a more stable provider.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_NETWORK_ERROR.title: Could not reach the model provider
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_NETWORK_ERROR.body: A network or DNS error prevented access to the provider. Check your network, proxy, and Base URL.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_GATEWAY_ERROR.title: Model provider service is unavailable
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_GATEWAY_ERROR.body: The provider returned a gateway or service error. Retry later or use another provider.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_PERMISSION_DENIED.title: Model provider permission denied
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_PERMISSION_DENIED.body: The provider account does not have permission for this model or operation. Check account permissions or choose another model.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_BILLING_REQUIRED.title: Model provider billing is required
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_BILLING_REQUIRED.body: The selected provider needs active billing, credits, or quota before it can complete this request.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_UNSUPPORTED_MODEL.title: Model does not support this request
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_UNSUPPORTED_MODEL.body: The selected model is unavailable or does not support the requested capability. Choose a supported model and retry.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND.title: Model provider endpoint was not found
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND.body: The provider endpoint or API path was not found. Check the Base URL, deployment name, and API compatibility.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_INVALID_REQUEST.title: Model provider rejected the request
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_INVALID_REQUEST.body: The provider reported that the request was invalid. Simplify the message or check model/provider settings.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_INVALID_TOOL_SCHEMA.title: Tool schema was rejected by the provider
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_INVALID_TOOL_SCHEMA.body: The provider rejected a tool definition in this request. Update the agent or disable the incompatible tool, then retry.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_CONTEXT_TOO_LARGE.title: Context is too large for the model
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_CONTEXT_TOO_LARGE.body: The request exceeds the model context limit. Reduce message content, referenced files, or conversation history, then retry.

USER_LLM_PROVIDER_EMPTY_RESPONSE.title: Model provider returned an empty response
USER_LLM_PROVIDER_EMPTY_RESPONSE.body: The provider completed the request without usable content. Retry once or switch providers if it repeats.

WORKSPACE_PATH_RUNTIME_UNAVAILABLE.title: The current Agent failed to run in this workspace path
WORKSPACE_PATH_RUNTIME_UNAVAILABLE.body: Make sure the current workspace path exists.
WORKSPACE_PATH_RUNTIME_UNAVAILABLE.bodyWithPath: The current Agent failed to run in the workspace path "{{workspacePath}}". Make sure the workspace path exists.

UNKNOWN_UPSTREAM_ERROR.title: The upstream agent or provider failed
UNKNOWN_UPSTREAM_ERROR.body: The app received an upstream error but could not classify whether it came from the agent, provider, network, or local environment.

MCP_HTTP_RESPONSE_READ_FAILED.title: Failed to read the team helper response
MCP_HTTP_RESPONSE_READ_FAILED.body: LingAI could not read the local team helper response. Retry once, and if it keeps happening, restart the app.

MCP_TOOL_REMOTE_ERROR.title: The local team helper rejected the request
MCP_TOOL_REMOTE_ERROR.body: The local team helper returned an error while processing this request. Review the details below and retry after adjusting the team action.

MCP_TOOL_RESPONSE_UNEXPECTED.title: The team helper returned an unexpected response
MCP_TOOL_RESPONSE_UNEXPECTED.body: LingAI received an unexpected response from the local team helper. Retry once, and report it if the problem persists.

MCP_TCP_READ_FAILED.title: Failed to read from the local team helper
MCP_TCP_READ_FAILED.body: LingAI could not read the local team helper TCP response. Retry once, and restart the app if it keeps failing.

TEAM_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Team service is not ready yet
TEAM_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.body: The local team session is still starting or has been interrupted. Wait a moment and retry.

TEAM_ASSISTANT_ID_REQUIRED.title: A teammate assistant must be selected
TEAM_ASSISTANT_ID_REQUIRED.body: Choose a real assistant from the available assistant catalog before creating or spawning a teammate.

TEAM_ASSISTANT_NOT_FOUND.title: The selected assistant is no longer available
TEAM_ASSISTANT_NOT_FOUND.body: Refresh the assistant catalog, then choose another assistant for this teammate.

TEAM_ASSISTANT_FIELD_UNSUPPORTED.title: The request used a legacy team identity field
TEAM_ASSISTANT_FIELD_UNSUPPORTED.body: This team action must use assistant_id instead of legacy backend or agent fields.

workspace.title: Project
workspace.pasteConfirm_message: Are you sure you want to paste '{{name}}' into the selected folder ({{target}})?
workspace.emptyDescription: Files will appear here after uploading files or opening a folder
workspace.createNewConversation: Create new chat in current project
workspace.dragOverlayDesc: Drag files or folders here to copy them into this project.
workspace.dragOverlayHint: Tip: drop anywhere to import into the selected folder.
workspace.dragNoFiles: No valid files detected. Please drag from Finder/Explorer.

contextMenu.deleteConfirm: This will delete the file from your system. Continue?
contextMenu.renameTimeout: Rename request timed out, please try again

errors.outsideSandbox: File is outside the project sandbox, cannot preview.
errors.notFound: File does not exist or has been deleted.
errors.timeout: Reading file timed out. Please retry.

changes.emptyDescription: File changes will appear here when AI modifies files

chat.noModelSelected: No model selected for current session, cannot send message
chat.quotaExceededBody: The current model quota is exhausted. Switch to {{model}} to continue?
chat.quotaExceededNoFallback: Model quota reached. Please switch to another available model.
chat.apiErrorNoCli: API error occurred. No CLI agent available for fallback.

speech.unsupported: Voice input is not available in this environment
speech.recordingUnsupported: Live recording is not supported here. Please upload an audio file instead
speech.genericError: Voice input failed. Please try again

sideQuestion.title: Side Question
sideQuestion.description: Ask a quick question about the current conversation
sideQuestion.noAnswer: The side question did not have a clear answer in the current conversation.
sideQuestion.parentTaskRunning: Main task still running in the background.
sideQuestion.dismissHint: Press Escape, Enter, or Space to dismiss
sideQuestion.unsupported: Side questions are not available for this conversation.
sideQuestion.alreadyRunning: A side question is already running.
sideQuestion.attachmentsNotAllowed: Side questions cannot include files or DOM snippets.
sideQuestion.emptyQuestion: Please enter a side question after /btw.
sideQuestion.toolsRequired: /btw can only answer questions based on what's already in this conversation. It doesn't have access to search, browse, or fetch new information.
sideQuestion.error: Failed to answer the side question.

commandQueue.title: Queued Commands
commandQueue.editPlaceholder: Update the queued command before it runs.
commandQueue.pausedAfterFailure: The next queued command could not start. Edit, reorder, or remove it to continue.
commandQueue.queueFull: Queue is full. Remove a command before adding more.
commandQueue.inputTooLong: This queued command is too long. Shorten it before sending.
commandQueue.tooManyFiles: Too many files are attached to this queued command.
commandQueue.queueTooLarge: Queue data is too large to persist safely. Remove some queued commands first.

skill_generator.title: Generate Skill/Rule
skill_generator.no_files: No relevant files found in project
skill_generator.name_required: Please enter a name for the preset

mcp.managementHint: If an MCP looks abnormal, it is usually caused by the MCP JSON configuration. Go to Tools settings and test it there.

runtimePreparing.sendboxHint: Preparing the runtime environment. First startup can take a little longer.

sendbox.hint: Type / for commands, @ to reference files

ACP_EMPTY_TURN.body: This request produced no visible reply.

ACP_EMPTY_TURN_MAX_TOKENS.body: This request hit the model's output token limit before any visible reply was produced.

ACP_EMPTY_TURN_MAX_TURN_REQUESTS.body: This request hit the model's request limit before any visible reply was produced.

ACP_EMPTY_TURN_REFUSAL.body: The model refused this request before producing any visible reply.

notFound: Conversation not found or has been deleted
